name: Smart human takeover & auto pause AI-powered Facebook Messenger chatbot

user.name: Nguyб»…n Thiб»Үu ToГ n (Jay Nguyen)
user.bio:
IвҖҷm the Founder & CEO of GenStaff. My work focuses on building AI Staff and automation systems that help businesses operate with fewer manual processes and greater efficiency.

IвҖҷm particularly interested in how AI and no-code tools can transform complex workflows into scalable systems.

I also share what I learn about AI, automation, and system thinking along the way.

description:
рҹӨ– Facebook Messenger Chatbot - Smart Human Takeover, Auto Pause & Context-Aware
Adaptable to n8n 1.113+ and 2.x
by Nguyen Thieu Toan (Jay Nguyen)

рҹ“– Overview

An intelligent Facebook Messenger chatbot that automatically detects human agent intervention and pauses AI responses accordingly. Features smart pause management, full context preservation, and seamless handoff between AI and human support.

Perfect for:
рҹ’ј Customer support with AI + human escalation
рҹҺҜ Sales conversations requiring manual intervention
рҹӣ пёҸ Technical support needing human expertise
рҹӨқ Any chatbot requiring human oversight capability

Requirements: n8n v1.113.0+, Facebook App with Messenger, Google Gemini API key (or compatible LLM)

рҹ”— Complementary Workflow  
Smart Facebook Messenger Chatbot вҖ“ Message Batching & History

Enhances Messenger automation with intelligent batching, conversation tracking, and context-aware responses.  
Messages are grouped, stored, and processed with full history for smoother interactions.

Why combine?  
рҹ§© Smart Batch (v3): Efficient multi-message handling, reduced spam  
рҹ“ң Conversation History: Maintains context across sessions  
рҹӨ– AI Responses: Natural, context-aware replies  
вҡЎ Scalability: Sequential processing for reliable delivery  

рҹ‘ү Access workflow
Smart Facebook Messenger Chatbot вҖ“ Message Batching & History

вҡЎ Key Features

Core Capabilities

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| рҹ”Қ Human Takeover Detection | Automatically detects when admin/human sends messages from page via metadata checking |
| вҸёпёҸ Smart Auto-Pause | Bot pauses for configurable duration (default 60s) when human joins conversation |
| рҹ“қ Context Preservation | Saves both AI and human responses in conversation history for seamless continuity |
| рҹ“Ӣ Whitelist Management | Tracks paused users with timestamp-based auto-resume (no manual intervention needed) |
| рҹ”„ Seamless Handoff | Smooth transition between AI and human, then automatic resume after timeout |
| рҹҸў Multi-Page Support | Single workflow handles multiple Facebook Pages via page_id differentiation |
| рҹ“Ҡ Full History Context | AI sees both previous AI and human responses when resuming |

Technical Highlights

вң… Metadata-based detection (message.metadata == "bot_rep")
вң… Timestamp-based pause management (auto-expires)
вң… Upsert operation for whitelist (updates if exists, inserts if new)
вң… Composite key indexing (user_id + page_id)
вң… Zero manual cleanup required
вң… Full conversation context preserved across handoffs

рҹҸ—пёҸ How It Works

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ 1. Message Intake                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў The system receives incoming messages from different   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   sources and identifies their type.                     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                         вҶ“
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ 2. Human Interaction Recognition                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Detects when a human is involved and records the event в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Adjusts automated handling accordingly.                в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                         вҶ“
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ 3. Pause & Resume Control                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Temporarily pauses automation when needed              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Resumes once conditions are met.                       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                         вҶ“
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ 4. Automated Response                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Processes messages with context                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў Generates and delivers appropriate replies.            в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
